release_review.summary: Patch release: opens Env App web services through the active access context, tightens Desktop welcome environment and runtime-state semantics, keeps Workbench text defaults aligned, and completes dependency/security notice updates. No Runtime Service protocol or compatibility window changes.
release_review.same_window_rationale: The release does not add or change Runtime Service snapshot fields, sys.ping payload semantics, attach/start contracts, startup report carriers, Desktop IPC compatibility payloads, Workbench persisted layout schema versions, Env App shell readiness, or SSH bootstrap requirements. The changes stay within Env App navigation/access-context handling, Desktop welcome state selection, UI defaults, documentation, and dependency lock/notice maintenance, so the existing protocol version, compatibility epoch, minimum Desktop version, and minimum Runtime version remain valid.
checked_surfaces: Env App web service opening through desktop, local, and remote access contexts
Env App port forwards page local-access routing and copy/open actions
Code App local UI gateway external URL resolution and local-access origin handling
Desktop welcome environment catalog, live runtime-state preference, and view model semantics
Desktop persistence, preload, shell bridge, and session-context IPC wiring
Env App Workbench default text annotation sizing and background layer defaults
Runtime Workbench layout schema migration and snapshot/event APIs
Desktop managed runtime start, attach, and open gating
startup report and local-ui runtime state carriers
Env App sys.ping runtime service payload
Env App desktop first-screen readiness IPC
SSH-managed runtime bootstrap and attach flow
open-source hygiene, third-party notices, and npm lockfile security updates
